name: session-wrap
description: Capture shutdown context and summarize it at the next interactive session
prompt:
Summarize the previous session from the deferred shutdown transcript above:
1. What was accomplished (2-3 bullets)
2. Key decisions made (if any)
3. What's unfinished / next steps

Save to Engram with a title using the previous session end date shown above and type 'learning'. If Engram is unavailable, write a dated file under ~/.pi/routines/logs/ instead.

Keep it under 200 words.
